info.name: User & Role API
info.description: Postman collection for User, Role, Agency, and Host endpoints (updated with Host & Request APIs)

item.name: Agency accepts or rejects “Left Agency” request
Admin Salary Management
item.description: Admin endpoints for managing salary cycles, agency commissions, and transaction unlocking

request.description: Get paginated list of salary cycles with optional filters
Get aggregated statistics for salary cycles (totals by status, amounts)
Get detailed information about a specific salary cycle including calculations
Recalculate a salary cycle with current policy (creates adjustment transaction)
Put salary cycle on hold (prevents payout)
Release a held salary cycle
Force payout of a salary cycle (bypasses normal checks)
Reverse a completed salary payment (creates reversal transaction)
Get paginated list of agency commission cycles
Get aggregated statistics for agency commissions
Get detailed information about a specific agency commission cycle
Unlock previously locked transaction funds (makes them withdrawable)
Re-lock previously unlocked transaction funds
Get complete wallet lock status for a user (locked amounts, pending unlocks)

item.name: Disputes
item.description: Dispute management for salary and commission calculations

body.raw:
{
  "cycleId": "",
  "cycleType": "salary",
  "reason": "I believe my salary calculation is incorrect",
  "expectedAmount": 5000,
  "evidence": "Screenshots attached showing discrepancy"
}

request.description: Raise a new dispute for salary or commission cycle
Get all disputes raised by the authenticated user
Get detailed information about a specific dispute
Admin: Get all disputes with filtering options
Admin: Mark dispute as under review
Admin: Preview recalculation result without applying changes
Admin: Resolve dispute by recalculating and creating adjustment transaction
Admin: Reject dispute (calculation was correct)
Admin: Approve dispute with custom adjustment amount

item.name: Alerts
item.description: Alert monitoring and management system for anomaly detection

request.description: Get all alerts with filtering by status, severity, type
Get aggregated alert statistics (counts by status, severity, type)
Get detailed information about a specific alert
Get all alerts for a specific entity (host, user, agency, wallet)
Mark alert as acknowledged (admin is aware)
Mark alert as resolved with resolution notes
Acknowledge multiple alerts at once
Delete resolved alerts older than specified days (cleanup)

item.name: KPIs & Dashboards
item.description: Admin dashboard metrics and system health monitoring

request.description: High-level overview: active users/hosts/agencies, financials, alerts, disputes, gifts
Overall system health: DB status, cron health, stuck cycles, wallet mismatches, critical alerts
Wallet health metrics: total/locked/withdrawable amounts, distribution, mismatches
Salary cycle status and anomalies: by status, zero salary, recent cycles, stuck cycles
Gift velocity and loop detection: high volume senders, gift loops, receiver spikes

item.name: Fraud Management
item.description: Fraud detection and action management system

request.description: Get all fraud actions with filtering by status, type, target
Get detailed fraud action with full audit trail
Get all fraud actions for a specific target (user, host, wallet, device)
Get fraud statistics (actions by type, status, trends)
Create manual fraud action (block user/host/wallet/device). durationHours: 0 = no expiry
Release a fraud action (make it inactive)

item.name: Queue Management
item.description: Admin APIs for background job queue monitoring and management

request.description: Get statistics for all queues (waiting, active, completed, failed jobs)
Get statistics for specific queue (salary, commission, wallet-unlock, etc.)
Get jobs in a specific queue filtered by status
Get detailed information about a specific job
Retry a failed job
Remove a job from the queue (waiting or failed jobs only)
Clean old jobs from queue. grace: time in ms, status: completed|failed
Pause queue processing (stop processing new jobs)
Resume queue processing
Create new host salary policy with rates and bonuses
Create new agency commission policy
Get all salary and commission policies
Process salary cycles for all hosts for specified month/year
Execute payout for all approved salary cycles
Get salary statistics for specified period
Calculate commissions for all agencies for specified month/year
Execute payout for all approved commissions
Get commission statistics for specified period
